title: Extra Receipt Handling
adjustPaymentsHelp: Reduce one or more payment legs until the collected total matches the order total.
returnCashChangeHelp: Return {amount} as cash change to the customer.
autoAllocateHelp: Apply excess to oldest-due invoices and orders per tenant policy.
autoAllocateConfirmed: Allocation preview confirmed — submit to post with the order.
manualAllocateHelp: Choose which open invoices or orders receive the excess amount.
manualAllocateConfirmed: Manual allocation confirmed — submit to post with the order.
saveAsAdvanceHelp: Credit the extra amount to the customer's advance balance for future orders.
saveToWalletHelp: Add {amount} to the customer's wallet for future payments.
saveAsCreditHelp: Issue an open credit note the customer can use on future orders.
walkInHint: Link a customer account to save extra as wallet, advance, or credit. Otherwise adjust payment amounts or return cash change.
walletVsAdvanceHint: Wallet = spend on next order. Advance = prepaid deposit on account.

guidance.title: This payment is {amount} more than the order total
guidance.pickOne: Choose one option below. Only one destination applies to the full extra amount.
guidance.walkInHint: Link a customer account to save extra as wallet, advance, or credit. Otherwise adjust payment amounts or return cash change.

allocation.noOpenBalances: No eligible open balances for this customer.
allocation.manualBlockedReturn: Could not confirm allocation. Return to Extra Receipt and pick Save as advance, Add to wallet, or Auto allocate.
allocation.autoFallbackHint: Remaining {amount} will go to {destination} based on your store's allocation policy.
allocation.manualRemaining: Still to allocate: {amount}. Allocate the full extra or choose another option.
allocation.manualOverAllocated: Over-allocated by {amount}. Reduce so the total matches the extra.
allocation.confirmedToast: Allocation confirmed. You can submit the order now.
allocation.remainingUnallocatedError: Allocation must fully cover the excess amount.
